class.name: PlayFabPartyMember
class.brief_description: Snapshot of a peer in a [PlayFabPartyNetwork].
class.description: Returned by [method PlayFabPartyPeer.get_peer_member]. Records the peer id, PlayFab entity key, optional cached [PlayFabUser], and whether the snapshot describes the local participant.

method.name: get_peer_id
method.description: Returns the Godot peer id assigned by the host.

method.name: get_entity_key
method.description: Returns the PlayFab entity key dictionary describing the peer.

method.name: get_user
method.description: Returns the local [PlayFabUser], if known, otherwise [code]null[/code].

method.name: is_local_member
method.description: Returns whether the snapshot describes the local participant.

members.member: Godot peer id assigned by the host.
PlayFab entity key dictionary for the peer.
Whether this snapshot describes the local participant.
